parameters.query: SELECT json_build_object('report_id', r.id, 'category', r.sous_categorie, 'year', 2026, 'providers_used', json_build_array('perplexity','openai','google','anthropic'), 'companies', json_agg(json_build_object('rank_consolidated', rc.rank, 'name', c.nom, 'name_normalized', c.nom_normalise, 'domain', c.domain, 'country', c.country, 'employees_range', c.employees_range, 'best_description', c.description, 'cited_by', rc.cited_by, 'visibility_score', rc.visibility_score, 'avg_position', rc.avg_position_in_lists, 'source_count', rc.source_count) ORDER BY rc.rank), 'stats', json_build_object('total_unique_companies', COUNT(*), 'cited_by_4_llms', COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE rc.visibility_score = 4), 'cited_by_3_llms', COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE rc.visibility_score = 3), 'cited_by_2_llms', COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE rc.visibility_score = 2), 'cited_by_1_llm', COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE rc.visibility_score = 1))) AS payload FROM public.reports r JOIN public.report_companies rc ON rc.report_id = r.id JOIN public.companies c ON c.id = rc.company_id WHERE r.id = (($1::jsonb)->>'report_id')::uuid GROUP BY r.id, r.sous_categorie;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, report_id: $json.report_id, html_url: $json.html_url, html_size: $json.html_size_bytes, stats: $json.stats } }}
